achievements.title: A Warning Daring Adventurer!
achievements.description: [Ys I] Easy difficulty isn't allowed unless stated in the achievement's description
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Talking is its Own Reward
achievements.description: [Ys I] In Port Barbado, obtain a Short Sword from Slaff
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Look Mom, I'm Adventuring!
achievements.description: [Ys I] Achieve your first level up
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Warning Noted, and Ignored
achievements.description: [Ys I] After Julius warns you about crossing the bridge, obtain the Golden Vase before entering Minea for the first time
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: P(r)im, but not Proper
achievements.description: [Ys I] Thanks to some bargaining with Pim, get him to reduce all his prices by 10%
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: He'll Probably Sell it for More Anyway
achievements.description: [Ys I] When selling something to Pim, convince him to offer an extra 10% to anything you sell him
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: I Wonder Who's the Wife
achievements.description: [Ys I] Cheer up Donis in Minea's bar by finding and returning his Sapphire Ring.
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Some Things Never Change
achievements.description: [Ys I] While you might want to start your search for the Books of Ys now, speak to Sara to learn what you need before your quest begins
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Teller of Your Fortune
achievements.description: [Ys I] After getting a full set of equipment, obtain Sara's Crystal from the Fortuneteller Sara
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: What Does it Taste Like?
achievements.description: [Ys I] Obtain and drink the Bestiary Potion. Now you can view enemy stats in the Note section!
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Key to Part of Solomon Shrine
achievements.description: [Ys I] Speak with Sara's aunt Jeba and be given the Shrine Key
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: DragonForce Your Way Through
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat the vanishing wizard Jenocres in the Shrine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: This Swordsman's Got a Pop-Up Blocker
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Jenocres while hitting them every time they appear
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Holders of Power I
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Jenocres without taking damage
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Fantasy Equipment in a Nutshell
achievements.description: [Ys I] Find the Shield Ring in the Shrine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Ring Around the Adol
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat the oversized centiped Nygtilger in the depths of the Shrine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Holders of Power II
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Nygtilger without taking damage
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Masquerading Swordsman I
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Nygtilger while wearing the Mask of Eyes
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Adol, the Master of Unlocking
achievements.description: [Ys I] Open every treasure chest in the Shrine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Oh Joy, They Added an Escort Mission
achievements.description: [Ys I] Rescue Feena from her cell in the lower levels of the Shrine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Staining a Maiden's Hands
achievements.description: [Ys I] Help Feena in trying to earn a level up
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Someone Call the SSS!
achievements.description: [Ys I] A deadend is a great spot for measuring stuff, even things left out of one's autobiography
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Plunderer First, Freer Second
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Nygtilger and open all chests in the entire Shrine before escorting Feena out of the Shrine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Maybe the Prison was Safer
achievements.description: [Ys I] Earn the Goban character note after getting the ones for Lugan the Thief and Morgan the Thief
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Silver Bells Ring, You Listening?
achievements.description: [Ys I] Receive the Power Ring for returning the Silver Bell to Mayor Robels
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Plain Treasure Hunting Experience
achievements.description: [Ys I] Obtain every treasure in the Plains
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: First Step Towards Talwars
achievements.description: [Ys I] For telling Slaff about your adventure so far, receive a Talwar for free
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Wanderer from Esteria
achievements.description: [Ys I] Help the sleepwalking ministrel, Luta Gemma, return home to his wife. He won't get in danger again... right?
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: She Really Could See the Future
achievements.description: [Ys I] Obtain your second Book of Ys in the Town of Minea
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Is That a Fact?
achievements.description: [Ys I] After getting the Volume of Tovah, speak with Goban to hear his suspicions regarding Sara's attacker
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Stop, Adol Time!
achievements.description: [Ys I] Find the Timer Ring in the Abandoned Mine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Mid-Dungeon Healing
achievements.description: [Ys I] Find the Heal Ring in the Abandoned Mine. Now you can heal in dungeons or even faster everywhere else!
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Reah-Lize Your Poet's Potential
achievements.description: [Ys I] Return Reah's Harmonica and hear her melody atop the ramparts of Minea
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Poet and you Know it
achievements.description: [Ys I] Hear Reah's poem for returning both of her missing items
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: I am a Swordsman, I Speak With the Trees
achievements.description: [Ys I] Receive a gift from one of the Roda Trees
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: EXP Will Only get You so Far
achievements.description: [Ys I] Reach the max level of 10
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: This Bat Drinks Your Sanity
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat the beast of the night Vagullion in the depths of the Abandoned Mine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Bring Garlic Next Time
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Vagullion with a weaker armor and shield (Tier 3 or lower)
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Masquerading Swordsman II
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Vagullion while wearing the Mask of Eyes
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Mining for Riches
achievements.description: [Ys I] Open every treasure chest in the Abandoned Mine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Why Can't I Remember Anything More?
achievements.description: [Ys I] View the scene with Feena by the lake
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Night has Just Begun
achievements.description: [Ys I] Enter Darm Tower (anything outside the tower is missable beyond this point!)
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Stuck in a Wall, and You're to Blame
achievements.description: [Ys I] To ensure no accidents happen, have Goban take a consumable transportation item
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Meeting of Your New Best Friend
achievements.description: [Ys I] Losses aren't always a bad thing, sometimes you find what you need because of them
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Origins of Darm Tower
achievements.description: [Ys I] Learn part of the tale that took place 700 years ago
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: King Graham Wasn't This Lucky
achievements.description: [Ys I] Have Dogi break into all three prison cells in Darm Tower
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Prey for Your Survival
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat the giant mantis Pictimos in Darm Tower
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Chase of Shadow
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Pictimos without taking damage
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Masquerading Swordsman III
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Pictimos while wearing the Mask of Eyes
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Putting Some Holes in Your Plan
achievements.description: [Ys I] With the help of a hammer, quiet down the Devil's Corridor
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Between a Rock and a Hard Place
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat the rock tornado Khonsclard in Darm Tower
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Sticks and Stones Won't Break My Bones
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Khonsclard with at least 50% of your max HP remaining
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Masquerading Swordsman IV
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Khonsclard while wearing the Mask of Eyes
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Girl in the Tower
achievements.description: [Ys I] I'm calling out, please tell me what to do... oh a Monocle to read the Books of Ys myself
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Luta Man's Family Heirloom
achievements.description: [Ys I] For showing him his lost book, obtain the Blue Amulet from Luta Gemma
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Indiana Adol and the Tower of Darm
achievements.description: [Ys I] Open every treasure chest in Darm Tower, not counting the tier 3 equipment.
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Way Ahead of You Demons
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat the demon heads Yogleks & Omulgunin in Darm Tower
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Not Reflecting on Your Actions
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Yogleks & Omulgunin while always staying on the left or right side of the giant mirror (starts once you've moved into position)
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Masquerading Swordsman V
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Yogleks & Omulgunin while wearing the Mask of Eyes
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Book War is Over
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat the fallen descendant Dark Fact atop Darm Tower
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Preserving Architecture
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Dark Fact without destroying the circle symbol in the center
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Music is More Important, Fact!
achievements.description: [Ys I] Enjoy listening to the final boss music by surviving for a minute againt Dark Fact, must have the core setting "Duplicate Frames in 30 Hz" enabled
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Your Flight is Booked
achievements.description: [Ys I] After defeating Dark Fact, read the sixth Book of Ys to complete your adventure in Esteria
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Better than a Butter Knife
achievements.description: [Ys I]  Obtain all three pieces of the first equipment set
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Longer, but Your Reach is the Same
achievements.description: [Ys I] Obtain all three pieces of the second equipment set
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Trust Your Insticts and Reflex(es)
achievements.description: [Ys I] Obtain all three pieces of the third equipment set
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Stealing From an Unknown Thief
achievements.description: [Ys I] Obtain all three pieces of the fourth equipment set
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Ready for (Almost) Every Battle
achievements.description: [Ys I] Obtain all three pieces of the fifth equipment set
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: An Unofficial Census
achievements.description: [Ys I] Obtain every character entry in the notebook (Three can be found in Darm Tower, but one of those could be obtained earlier)
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Hitlist Record Keeper I
achievements.description: [Ys I] Fill out all the information for all enemies found before Darm Tower
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Hitlist Record Keeper II
achievements.description: [Ys I] Fill out all the information for every normal enemy
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Pop Goes the Wizard
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Jenocres on Nightmare Difficulty
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: How's This Boss Harder?
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Nygtilger on Nightmare Difficulty
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Dracula Fears Him
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Vagullion on Nightmare Difficulty
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: You Pictimos-t Terrible Opponent
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Pictimos on Nightmare Difficulty
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Chase of Shadow Rematch
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Pictimos without taking damage on Nightmare Difficulty
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Boulder Swordsman
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Khonsclard on Nightmare Difficulty
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Causing Harm in Darm
achievements.description: [Ys I] Defeat Yogleks & Omulgunin on Nightmare Difficulty
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: What a Horrible Night-mare to have an Adol
achievements.description: [Ys I] Beat the game on Nightmare difficulty
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Overprepared for the Easiest Boss
achievements.description: [Ys I, Easy Allowed] Obtain all three pieces of the fourth equipment set before fighting Nygtilger
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Often Ignored Chests
achievements.description: [Ys I, Easy Allowed] Open the three chests in Darm Tower containing the tier three equipment
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Imagine Having a Weight Limit
achievements.description: [Ys I, Easy Allowed] Complete the game with minimal equipment (tier 1 sword, shield, and armor, tier 4 sword, shield, and armor, tier 5 sword, and Evil Ring)
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: CliffsNotes are More Detailed Than This
achievements.description: [Ys I, Easy Allowed] Reach the end of your journey with a playtime of 65 minutes or less
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Always on Time - Jenocres
achievements.description: [Ys I, Time Attack] Defeat Jenocres in under 35 seconds
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Always on Time - Nygtilger
achievements.description: [Ys I, Time Attack] Defeat Nygtilger in under 25 seconds
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Always on Time - Vagullion
achievements.description: [Ys I, Time Attack] Defeat Vagullion in under 3 minutes
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Always on Time - Pictimos
achievements.description: [Ys I, Time Attack] Defeat Pictimos in under 25 seconds
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Always on Time - Khonsclard
achievements.description: [Ys I, Time Attack] Defeat Khonsclard in under 15 seconds
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Always on Time - Yog & Omu
achievements.description: [Ys I, Time Attack] Defeat Defeat Yogleks & Omulgunin in under 30 seconds
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Always on Time - Dark Fact
achievements.description: [Ys I, Time Attack] Defeat Dark Fact in under 30 seconds
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Always on Time - Novice
achievements.description: [Ys I, Time Attack] Complete Time Attack in 6:00 or less
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Always on Time - Master
achievements.description: [Ys I, Time Attack] Complete Time Attack in five minutes and fifteen seconds or less
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: I Uh, Got You This
achievements.description: [Ys II] Re-gift an apple to the person who gave it to you.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: What A Romantic Ominous Temple That Is
achievements.description: [Ys II] Meet Lilia on the promontory behind Lance Village.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Enter... the Leg-Man
achievements.description: [Ys II] Get a free Short Sword.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Duck Bucks
achievements.description: [Ys II] Get some gold coins from the Village duck to live longer.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Your Path Will Surely Become Clear
achievements.description: [Ys II] Receive the gift of magic from the Goddesses.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Giant Enemy Crab
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Velagunder.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Adol the Nerd
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Velagunder without returning any of the Books of Ys. (Normal difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Blocking Is for Scrubs
achievements.description: [Ys II] Destroy Velagunder's claws before defeating it. (Normal difficulty or higher, no Time Attack)
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Crab Dipped
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Velagunder without taking damage. (Normal difficulty or higher, no time attack)
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Gila's Monsters
achievements.description: [Ys II] Permanently clear out Gila's entire basement.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Imagine the Overdue Fines
achievements.description: [Ys II] Return all six Books of Ys.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Selfless
achievements.description: [Ys II] Cure Lilia and get Return magic.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: I'm Sure It's Safe
achievements.description: [Ys II] Make an ice bridge in the Ice Ridge.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Flea Flicked
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Tyalmath.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Flea Collared
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Tyalmath without taking damage. (Normal difficulty or higher, no Time Attack)
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: A Fiend's Cache
achievements.description: [Ys II] Find the boss's hidden chest in the Ice Ridge of Noltia.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: I Heard What You Said
achievements.description: [Ys II] Trick Ruba into telling the truth, and reveal your ruse.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Make Sure It Covers Your Nose
achievements.description: [Ys II] Use the Roda Leaf to cross through the poisonous gas.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Keith Smash!
achievements.description: [Ys II] Liberate Tarf from his prison and agree to escort him home.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: God-Tier Rascal
achievements.description: [Ys II] Raise Tarf up to level 25.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Little Brother Adol
achievements.description: [Ys II] Get outclassed by Tarf. [Adol's level <= 24]
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Hahahaha This Sucks, Man
achievements.description: [Ys II] ... "measure" Tarf.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Okay What the Hell Was That
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Gelaldy.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Ew I Don't Wanna Touch It
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Gelaldy without taking damage. (Normal difficulty or higher, no Time Attack)
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Does This Thing Get 5G
achievements.description: [Ys II] Get the Lila Shell from Hadat.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Same Password As My Luggage
achievements.description: [Ys II] Eavesdrop on the meeting and learn the Temple password.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: I Never Roda Fruit I Didn't Like
achievements.description: [Ys II] Eat all three Roda Fruit from around the world in one session.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: It's on Sight, Pal
achievements.description: [Ys II] I don't know who you are but I don't appreciate your attitude.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: This Rules, Actually
achievements.description: [Ys II] Get "cursed"... to be adorable.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: That's My Hideout, I Don't Know You
achievements.description: [Ys II] Try and enter the Canal Hideout while transformed.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Stupid Societal Beauty Standards
achievements.description: [Ys II] Dispel the curse of Dalles.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Hey Guys, I'm Back! ... Guys?
achievements.description: [Ys II] Unwittingly bring tragedy to the Runaways' Hideout.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: But My Walkthrough Said...
achievements.description: [Ys II] Talk to the guard where the Goddess Pendant used to be.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: She's Flint- I Mean Fine!
achievements.description: [Ys II] Talk to Banoa while Lilia is... indisposed.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: The Arch-Arachnid
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Druegar.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Bug Sprayed
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Druegar without taking damage. (Normal difficulty or higher, no Time Attack)

achievements.title: Nice To Finally Meet You
achievements.description: [Ys II] Get the Waterway Key from Keith.

achievements.title: Bats Below the Belfry
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Zava.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Bats, We're Bats, We're the Bats
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Zava without taking damage. (Normal difficulty or higher, no Time Attack)
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Cute but No
achievements.description: [Ys II] Try an innovative solution to your problems in front of Maria.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Oh Crap Oh Crap Oh Crap
achievements.description: [Ys II] Climb the bell tower, talk to Dalles, and lose all hope.

achievements.title: Getting Some Bad Vibes from This Thing
achievements.description: [Ys II] Find the Black Pearl... again.

achievements.title: Moisturised and Flourishing
achievements.description: [Ys II] Liberate the villagers in the Hideout.

achievements.title: Sword Beats Rock
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Dalles.
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: Don't Dare Do It
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Dalles without taking damage. (Normal difficulty or higher, no Time Attack)
achievements.author: malasdair

achievements.title: C'mon Man, You're Weirding Me Out
achievements.description: [Ys II] Climb into three beds that don't belong to you. Creep.

achievements.title: I'm Very Hungry
achievements.description: [Ys II] Eat four special homemade foods in one session.

achievements.title: It's Okay to Cry
achievements.description: [Ys II] Play the harmonica and liberate the Goddesses.

achievements.title: You're Darm Right
achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Darm and save the world.

achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Darm without using shield magic. (Normal difficulty or higher)

achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Darm without taking damage. (Normal difficulty or higher, no Time Attack)

achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Velagunder on Nightmare difficulty.

achievements.description: [Ys II] Defeat Gelaldy on Nightmare difficulty.
